modules.title: Heart Rate Monitoring (HR Module)
modules.description: Advanced real-time HR analysis engine with clinical-grade monitoring. Detects bradycardia (<60 bpm), tachycardia (>100 bpm), and critical conditions requiring immediate attention.

modules.title: Multi-Device Fusion
modules.description: Intelligent aggregation from Apple Watch, Fitbit, Garmin, and other wearables.

modules.title: Alert & Recommendation Engine
modules.description: Real-time health alerts with personalized recommendations.

modules.title: Target Heart Rate Zones
modules.description: Age-adjusted exercise zones using Karvonen formula.
